---
title: "Joseph Settimi"
---

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Sports writing. Data visualization. R code. Looking for signal in the noise.
:::

## Featured

::: {.featured-grid}

::: {.featured-card .cyan}
<span class="badge badge-interactive">Interactive</span>

### Wemby

Shot patterns and offensive flow in the 2026 Finals. With interactive shot charts.

[Read →](posts/wemby.html)
:::

::: {.featured-card .indigo}
<span class="badge badge-essay">Essay</span>

### The Dusty May Moratorium

Michigan's championship and what it means for the ghosts of past failures.

[Read →](posts/dusty_may.html)
:::

:::

::: {.stats-section}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-item}
**2**

Articles
:::

::: {.stat-item}
**∞**

Graphs
:::

::: {.stat-item}
**1**

Author
:::

:::
:::

<p class="section-label">Interactive</p>

## Graphs & Visualizations

<p class="section-description">R-powered explorations of sports data. Plotly charts, shot maps, and whatever else I'm curious about this week.</p>

::: {.graphs-grid}

::: {.graph-card .graph-cyan}
<p class="label">Visualization</p>
#### Shot chart comparison
:::

::: {.graph-card .graph-indigo}
<p class="label">Visualization</p>
#### Team performance trends
:::

::: {.graph-card .graph-pink}
<p class="label">Visualization</p>
#### Statistical deep dives
:::

::: {.graph-card .graph-amber}
<p class="label">Visualization</p>
#### Player comparison tool
:::

:::

::: {.cta-section}
### More writing

See all posts, graphs, and data explorations.

[View all →](posts.html){.btn-dark}
:::

::: {.footer}
Joseph Settimi © 2026
:::
